glosses.vi: quán cà phê; tiệm cà phê

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns im Kaffeehaus um drei.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtrɛfən ʊns ɪm kaˈfeːhaʊ̯s ʊm dʁaɪ̯/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns im Kaffeehaus um drei.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtrɛfən ʊns ɪm kaˈfeːhaʊ̯s ʊm dʁaɪ̯/
translations.en: We’re meeting at the coffeehouse at three.
translations.es: Nos vemos en la cafetería a las tres.
translations.fr: On se retrouve au café à trois heures.
translations.it: Ci vediamo al bar alle tre.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们三点在咖啡馆见面。
translations.yue: 我哋三點喺咖啡店見面。
translations.pt: Nos encontramos no café às três.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở quán cà phê lúc ba giờ.
translations.nl: We spreken om drie uur af in het café.
translations.hi: हम तीन बजे कैफ़े में मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Spotykamy się w kawiarni o trzeciej.
translations.nb: Vi møtes på kafé klokken tre.
translations.id: Saya akan bekerja sedikit lagi di kafe.
translations.sv: Vi ses på kaféet klockan tre.
translations.ro: Ne vedem la cafenea la ora trei.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se v kavárně ve tři.
translations.da: Vi mødes på café klokken tre.

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 1pl) indicating the action.
Reflexive/reciprocal personal pronoun in accusative; coreferential with the subject.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); introduces a dative prepositional phrase of location.
Common noun in dative as object of the preposition; place/location.
Preposition marking a time point.
Cardinal numeral functioning as temporal complement to 'um'.

sentences.target: Das Kaffeehaus hat heute leider geschlossen.

translations.de: Das Kaffeehaus hat heute leider geschlossen.
translations.en: The coffeehouse is closed today, unfortunately.
translations.es: Por desgracia, hoy la cafetería está cerrada.
translations.fr: Le café est malheureusement fermé aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Purtroppo oggi il bar è chiuso.
translations.zh-Hans: 咖啡馆今天关门了，真可惜。
translations.yue: 今日咖啡店冇開門，真可惜。
translations.pt: Infelizmente, o café está fechado hoje.
translations.vi: Tiếc là hôm nay quán cà phê đóng cửa.
translations.nl: Helaas is het café vandaag gesloten.
translations.hu: Sajnos ma zárva van a kávézó.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, το καφέ είναι κλειστό σήμερα.
translations.nb: Dessverre er kafeen stengt i dag.
translations.sv: Tyvärr är kaféet stängt i dag.
translations.ro: Din păcate, cafeneaua e închisă azi.
translations.da: Desværre er caféen lukket i dag.
translations.ja: 残念ながら今日はカフェが休みです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative neuter; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Auxiliary verb (present, 3sg) forming the perfect with the participle.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Sentential adverb expressing speaker attitude.
Past participle as main verb in perfect construction ('hat geschlossen').

sentences.target: Ich arbeite kurz im Kaffeehaus weiter.

translations.de: Ich arbeite kurz im Kaffeehaus weiter.
translations.en: I’m working a bit more at the coffeehouse.
translations.es: Voy a seguir trabajando un rato en la cafetería.
translations.fr: Je vais encore travailler un peu au café.
translations.it: Continuo a lavorare ancora un po' al bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在咖啡馆再多工作一会儿。
translations.yue: 我會喺咖啡店再工作一陣。
translations.ru: Я ещё немного поработаю в кафе.
translations.pt: Vou trabalhar mais um pouco no café.
translations.he: אני אעבוד עוד קצת בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ làm thêm một chút ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Ik werk nog even door in het café.
translations.uk: Я ще трохи попрацюю в кав’ярні.
translations.hu: Még egy kicsit dolgozom a kávézóban.
translations.hi: मैं कैफ़े में थोड़ा और काम करूँगा.
translations.el: Θα δουλέψω λίγο ακόμα στο καφέ.
translations.nb: Jeg jobber litt til på kafé.
translations.id: Saya akan bekerja sedikit lagi di kafe.
translations.sv: Jag jobbar lite till på kaféet.
translations.cs: Ještě chvilku budu pracovat v kavárně.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder lige lidt mere på caféen.
translations.ja: カフェでもう少しだけ仕事をします。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 1sg); part of the separable verb 'weiterarbeiten'.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates short duration.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); introduces a dative PP of location.
Common noun in dative as object of the preposition; location.
Separable verb particle of 'weiterarbeiten', placed clause-final.

sentences.target: Sie wartet vor dem Kaffeehaus auf mich.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈvaʁtət foːɐ̯ deːm kaˈfeːhaʊ̯s aʊ̯f mɪç/

translations.de: Sie wartet vor dem Kaffeehaus auf mich.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈvaʁtət foːɐ̯ deːm kaˈfeːhaʊ̯s aʊ̯f mɪç/
translations.en: She is waiting in front of the coffeehouse for me.
translations.es: Ella me está esperando frente a la cafetería.
translations.it: Lei mi sta aspettando davanti al bar.
translations.ko: 그녀는 카페 앞에서 나를 기다리고 있어.
translations.yue: 佢喺咖啡店門口等緊我。
translations.pt: Ela está me esperando na frente do café.
translations.he: היא מחכה לי מול בית הקפה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang đợi tôi trước quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Ze wacht op mij voor het café.
translations.uk: Вона чекає на мене перед кав’ярнею.
translations.hu: Ő a kávézó előtt vár rám.
translations.hi: वह कैफ़े के बाहर मेरा इंतज़ार कर रही है.
translations.pl: Ona czeka na mnie przed kawiarnią.
translations.nb: Hun venter på meg foran kafeen.
translations.id: Dia menunggu saya di depan kafe.
translations.sv: Hon väntar på mig utanför kaféet.
translations.ro: Ea mă așteaptă în fața cafenelei.
translations.da: Hun venter på mig foran caféen.
translations.ja: 彼女はカフェの前で私を待っています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 3sg).
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article in dative singular (neuter here), determiner for 'Kaffeehaus'.
Common noun in dative as object of 'vor'; location.
Preposition selecting accusative in this usage ('auf mich warten' = wait for).
1st-person singular personal pronoun in accusative; object of 'auf'.
